positive: A whimsical, abstract pattern featuring glowing constellations and stylized, minimalist celestial bodies (stars, crescent moons, planetary rings) integrated with a flowing, organic floral motif (daisies, lavender, ferns). The pattern should be arranged in a dense, repeating, yet non-uniform tile layout, creating a mesmerizing, ethereal tapestry effect. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meeting modern geometric minimalism. Color Palette: Deep indigo background with accents of luminous gold, cool cyan, and soft lavender. Composition: Seamless, highly symmetrical, central design for repeat printing. Lighting: Soft, internal glow emanating from the motifs, giving a dreamlike quality. Print Details: Vector art quality, high contrast, optimized for screen printing on a dark garment.
negative: blur, grain, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, writing, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn face, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, dirty, dirty edges, ugly, amateur, noise, JPEG artifacts
